_comment: Authoritative declaration of CC Director's SHIPPED cc-* tools for the Tools catalog page. This lists ONLY the core tools the installer actually delivers via the Python bundle (mirrors the "ship": true allowlist in tools/registry.json). Each tool gets two universal health checks (binary on PATH, --version responds) plus an optional read-only smoke command declared here. A null smoke means there is no zero-auth read-only command, so the tool is tested presence+version only - shown truthfully in the UI, never faked green. Embedded as a resource in CcDirector.Core so it is available at runtime regardless of working directory. Non-core tools live in the repo (buildable for dev) but are deliberately absent here so they never appear as a phantom NOT BUILT row. cc-browser is core but ships via the Node path (not the Python bundle) and is not health-checked here yet.

tools.name: cc-html
tools.description: Convert between Markdown and HTML with themes.

tools.name: cc-pdf
tools.description: Convert between Markdown and PDF with themes.

tools.name: cc-word
tools.description: Convert between Markdown and Word (.docx) with themes.

tools.name: cc-vault
tools.description: Personal contacts/secrets vault CLI. The only sanctioned way to query the vault.

tools.name: cc-settings
tools.description: Read and write CC Director config.json settings.

tools.name: cc-comm-queue
tools.description: Queue content into the Communication Manager approval workflow.

tools.name: cc-gmail
tools.description: Gmail CLI: read, send, search and manage email.
tools.note: Auth-gated (OAuth). No zero-auth read-only command. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-outlook
tools.description: Outlook/Microsoft 365 CLI: read, send, search email.
tools.note: Auth-gated (device code). No zero-auth read-only command. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-playwright
tools.description: Trusted-event browser automation via Playwright CDP with named, isolated connections.

tools.name: cc-sessions
tools.description: List every session running across the fleet.
tools.note: Requires a live session environment (CC_DIRECTOR_API). Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-whoami
tools.description: Show this session's own fleet identity.
tools.note: Requires a live session environment (CC_DIRECTOR_API). Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-send
tools.description: Send a message to another session in the fleet (or all of them).
tools.note: Requires a live session environment (CC_DIRECTOR_API). Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-ask
tools.description: Ask another session a question and get its answer back.
tools.note: Requires a live session environment (CC_DIRECTOR_API). Presence + version only.
